file_insights.changes: Added stage_transition event logging calls at fs::rename points for card state transitions (pending→running→done→merged/failed)
file_insights.significance: Core implementation of audit trail for all card lifecycle state changes; enables recovery and forensics

file_insights.changes: Instrumented all 5+ fs::rename operations in merge-gate logic with stage_transition event logging; added unique_failed_path() helper for failed state tracking
file_insights.significance: Fixes merge-gate infinite retry loop (ffb59e4 reference); prevents silent failures when cards already in failed/ directory

file_insights.changes: Session 7 completion snapshot documenting stage_transition logging implementation and JSONL append-only event log pattern
file_insights.significance: Progress tracking for WAL/storage resilience spec; confirms CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 and target/ cleanup pattern working

file_insights.changes: Spec 025 marked complete in dispatch queue (added to 'completed' list)
file_insights.significance: Orchestration state updated; spec 025 (bop-status-watch) finished before spec 026 (storage-resilience-wal-events) began

patterns_discovered: fs::rename is the atomic transaction primitive; all state transitions must be logged before/after rename for idempotency
JSONL append-only event log with <4096 byte lines ensures atomic writes on POSIX/APFS; O_APPEND is the durability mechanism
unique_failed_path() pattern prevents retry loops: always check all 5 state directories (pending/running/done/merged/failed) for card conflicts
Session-based architecture: each spec gets isolated session insights (session_NNN.json) to track discoveries independently
QA iteration history pattern: timestamp + duration tracking; allows post-mortem analysis of iteration count and convergence time
meta.json is materialized view of card state; sha256 checksum detects corruption; read-only between transitions
gotchas_discovered: fs::rename failure on already-in-failed/ was silent (EEXIST not surfaced); caused infinite merge-gate retry loop; now fixed via unique_failed_path()
CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 insufficient when card workspace moves (fs::rename pending/→done/); must also fs::remove_dir_all(target/) before ACs
git quotes non-ASCII SMP paths in diff output; path filter in policy script failed on card names with emoji; fixed via core.quotepath=false and is_runtime_path() runtime check
Stale CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR baked at compile time breaks when repo moves (gtfs→bop); must use find_git_root() at runtime instead of env!()
Policy check .gitignore had team-prefixed patterns only (.cards/*/running/) not flat paths (.cards/running/); coverage gap fixed

approach_outcome.scope: Added stage_transition event logging at all 5+ fs::rename points in card state machine (pending→running→done→merged→failed)
approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Instrumented dispatcher.rs and cards.rs with event log writes before/after each rename; used JSONL append-only pattern with O_APPEND atomic semantics
approach_outcome.verification: All 373 tests passed; make check (fmt, clippy, test) passed; no regressions; functional test confirmed live watch mode works; output/result.md screenshot provided
approach_outcome.commitment: ffb59e4 auto-claude: subtask-4-1 - Add stage_transition event logging at all fs::rename points
approach_outcome.qa_approval: approved by qa_agent on 2026-03-07T04:19:45Z; 1 iteration, 296.41 seconds

recommendations: Monitor event log file size over time; consider rotation strategy when logs exceed threshold (currently unbounded append-only)
Add metrics/dashboard to visualize stage_transition event frequency by state pair (pending→running count, etc.) for bottleneck detection
Cross-validate event log against filesystem state on dispatcher startup (idempotency check); replay events if meta.json checksum corrupted
Document WAL recovery procedure in CONTRIBUTING.md: how to rebuild meta.json from events.jsonl if corruption detected
Consider hardware-level durability: fsync() at 1000-event boundaries instead of every write (batch fsync for throughput vs latency trade-off)
Wave 5+ gate: implement event log compaction/archival when bop ui (spec 029) added; separate hot log from cold archive for faster watch performance
